acceptance_targets: [chapter_07_prose_001] Reading the revised beats anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:167, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:221, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:317, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:347, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:383, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:393, a reviewer can identify at least three separate reaction beats conveyed through specific characters or material details rather than a generalized room/air response, and those beats contain no more than one figurative 'the room' or 'the air' pressure marker.

[chapter_07_prose_002] A reviewer reading the revised beats anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:87, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:111, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:167, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:299, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:341, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:383 finds no more than one beat that begins by negating an incorrect description before giving the intended one; the revised beats land as direct assertions with distinct imagery.

findings.acceptance_test: Reading the revised beats anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:167, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:221, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:317, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:347, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:383, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:393, a reviewer can identify at least three separate reaction beats conveyed through specific characters or material details rather than a generalized room/air response, and those beats contain no more than one figurative 'the room' or 'the air' pressure marker.
findings.problem: The chapter keeps using the room or the air as a generic reaction vessel at major turns, so distinct revelation beats start landing in the same container-image instead of in character-specific consequences. That repetition flattens pressure in a chapter that otherwise has strong bodily specificity.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the reaction beats anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:167, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:221, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:317, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:347, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:383, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:393 so at least three of them register through named bodies, objects, or sounds already present in the scene rather than through 'the room' or 'the air.' Use concrete carriers already onstage such as Riva's poles, Iven's rope, Lale's bandaged arm, market noise, or Paska's tools.

findings.acceptance_test: A reviewer reading the revised beats anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:87, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:111, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:167, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:299, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:341, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:383 finds no more than one beat that begins by negating an incorrect description before giving the intended one; the revised beats land as direct assertions with distinct imagery.
findings.problem: The chapter overuses the same corrective-negation sentence shape at high-charge moments: 'It was not X...,' 'not shock, exactly,' 'not symbol or omen.' Repeating that template makes Lale's perception sound mannered and self-canceling when the style bible calls for direct, concrete pressure.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the charged beats anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:87, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:111, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:167, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:299, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:341, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:383 so most of them state the perception directly or via a fresh comparison grounded in touch, sound, or spatial pressure. Preserve at most one deliberate 'It was not...' turn across those beats if it is doing real emphasis work.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the collision of sanctity, lust, labor, rot, and family resentment. In edge cases, choose the more concrete, uncomfortable, and character-specific rendering over symbolic safety; if an image or action feels too polite for the pressure, it is probably wrong.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If sex, violence, shame, grief, or economic pressure drives a scene, vague language counts as a failed beat; replace euphemism with the exact bodily, social, or material consequence the character experiences.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the norm across dialogue; uncontracted forms are reserved for ritual speech, emphasis, or deliberate character-specific formality.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Vary scene count, dialogue density, and narrative movement aggressively: follow ordeal with meal, revelation with labor, schism with care, and public spectacle with close-bodied aftermath so no adjacent chapters share the same structural rhythm.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete, bodily, locally sacred, and unsanitized; lyrical only when pressure earns it, never as a decorative default.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third person rotating among the five siblings; each scene stays inside one consciousness and lets the river press through perception rather than omniscient explanation.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate muscular propulsion with denser lyric accumulation; peak scenes should tighten and clarify rather than dissolve into fragmentary haze.
